title: Directory
subtitle: A handle to a directory on disk. Lists contents, creates subdirectories, and walks file trees.

members.name: accessibleAncestors
members.description: Returns a list of accessible ancestor directories.

members.name: accessibleParents
members.description: Deprecated. Replaced by accessibleAncestors.

members.name: ancestorDirectories
members.description: Returns a list of ancestor directories.

members.name: at
members.description:
Returns a File or Directory object matching the name specified
    by aString or Nil if no such file or directory exists.

members.name: create
members.description:
Create the directory if it doesn't exist.
    Returns self on success (or if the directory already exists), nil on
    failure.

members.name: createFileNamed
members.description: Deprecated. Returns a new file object in the directory with the specified name.

members.name: createIfAbsent
members.description: Creates the directory (and any missing ancestor directories) if they don't exist. Returns self.

members.name: createSubdirectory
members.description: Create a subdirectory with the specified name.

members.name: currentWorkingDirectory
members.description: Returns the current working directory path.

members.name: directories
members.description: Returns a list of subdirectories in the receiver.

members.name: directoryNamed
members.description: Returns a Directory object for the specified file name whether or not it exists.

members.name: exists
members.description:
Returns true if the Directory path exists, and false otherwise.
    If optionalPath string is provided, it tests the existence of that path
    instead.

members.name: fileNamed
members.description: Returns a File object for the specified file name whether it exists or not.

members.name: fileNames
members.description: Returns a list of strings for the names of the files (no subdirectories) in the directory.

members.name: files
members.description: Returns a list of File objects for the files in the Directory (no directories).

members.name: filesWithExtension
members.description:
Returns a list of File objects for the files in the Directory (no directories)
    with the specified file extension.

members.name: folderNamed
members.description: Deprecated. Replaced by directoryNamed().

members.name: folderNamedCreateIfAbsent
members.description: Deprecated. Returns a new Directory object in the directory with the specified name.

members.name: folders
members.description: Deprecated. Replaced by directories().

members.name: isAccessible
members.description: Returns true if the directory can be accessed, false otherwise.

members.name: items
members.description:
Returns a list object containing File and Directory objects
    for the files and directories of the receiver's path.

members.name: localItems
members.description: All subitems excluding '.' and '..'.

members.name: moveTo
members.description: Moves the directory to the specified path.

members.name: name
members.description: Returns the receiver's last path component.

members.name: parentDirectory
members.description: Returns the parent directory object or nil if there is no parent directory.

members.name: parents
members.description: Deprecated. Replaced by ancestorDirectories.

members.name: path
members.description: Returns the directory path. The default path is '.'.

members.name: recursiveFilesOfTypes
members.description:
Returns a list containing all files in the directory or any subdirectory that
    has any of the specified suffixes.

members.name: remove
members.description: Removes the directory.

members.name: setCurrentWorkingDirectory
members.description:
Sets the current working directory path.
    Returns true on success or false on error.

members.name: setPath
members.description: Sets the directory path. Returns self.

members.name: size
members.description:
Returns a Number containing the number of file and directory
    objects at the receiver's path.

members.name: walk
members.description:
Recursively walks the current directory, and executes a given callback on each item (either File or Directory) found, excluding "." and "..". 
Io> Directory walk(println)
A0_List.io
A1_OperatorTable.io
...
Io> Directory walk(f, if(f name startsWithSeq("Directory"), f println))
Directory.io

members.name: with
members.description: Returns a new instance with the provided path.
